message.content:
@startuml
participant "Data Consumer" as DC
participant "Data Source" as DS

alt [No updates]
  DC -> DS: <u>1a.</u> GET [query URL]
  else
  DC -> DS: <u>1b.</u> POST [base query URL] with
end

alt [No updates]
  DS --> DC: <u>2a.</u> search-response Bundle with new records\n(use most recent meta.lastUpdated in filter for subsequent polls)
  else
  DS --> DC: <u>2b.</u> Empty search-response bundle
end

opt
  loop
    DC -> DS: <u>3a.</u> GET [next URL]
    DS --> DC: <u>3b.</u> search-response with Bundle of next results
  end
end

@enduml
